statement: In every magma, Equation 2149 (`x = ((y * y) * z) * (y * y)`) implies Equation 4213 (`x * y = ((z * y) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0603
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) z) (op y y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z y) y) y)
